Q: The sum of five consecutive positive integers is 150. What is the value of the middle number?

A: Let the middle number be x. The five consecutive integers are (x-2), (x-1), x, (x+1), (x+2). Their sum is (x-2)+(x-1)+x+(x+1)+(x+2)=5x=150. Therefore, x=30.
